subtitle.text: The Ender Guardian. The Harbinger. The Primordial. Three Cataclysm bosses that only exist after the portal opens.

description: CH.13 · THE END CHAIN
▸ Three Cataclysm bosses only spawn in the End.
They require portal access.
They are the continuation of the Cataclysm chain
from Ch11 — extended into the void.
Clear them in order. The final drops complete
the Cataclysm boss sequence.
◈ END CHAIN BOSSES
└ ✦ Ender Guardian (cataclysm:)
Found in End-specific ruins on outer islands
First post-portal Cataclysm encounter
Drops: End-tier Cataclysm materials
└ ✦ Harbinger (cataclysm:)
Mid-tier End boss, void-themed attacks
Uses void zone tactics (see Ch11 Annihilator guide)
Drops: Harbinger materials for final tier craft
└ ✦ Primordial (cataclysm:)
Ancient boss — the oldest Cataclysm entity
High HP, mixed attack patterns
Drops: Primordial materials = final Cataclysm tier
◈ FIGHT PREPARATION
└ Armor: Emulator-tier Cataclysm gear minimum
(Ignitium set is the floor, not the ceiling)
└ ISS Eldritch school: bonus vs void entities in End
└ Elytra + Fireworks: escape route when fight goes wrong
(End bosses often aggro from distance — have exit)
└ No regeneration mechanics in End: bring healing
◈ SEQUENCE NOTE
└ All three bosses: defeat in whatever order found
└ No hard prerequisite chain unlike Ch11 Cataclysm
└ Find boss structures by exploring outer End islands
(same island clusters as End Cities — nearby)
▸ The Primordial was here before the Dragon.
It watched the civilizations build the portal.
It watched them fill it with eyes.
It watched you open it.
It did not expect you to come for it next.
None of them expected that.
▶ Defeat the Harbinger [check]
▶ Defeat the Primordial [check]
◇ Cataclysm chain complete after Primordial.
Check JEI for any final-tier recipes unlocked.
The full chain took 5 chapters.
The loot chain took the same 5 chapters.
Both are complete now.
